name: agent-skills
description: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for Java/Spring WebFlux stack — agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules for reactive microservices development
author: TaiPT

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('Validating plugin structure...')" && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-plugin/plugin.json','utf8')); console.log('✓ plugin.json valid')" && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json','utf8')); console.log('✓ marketplace.json valid')" && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('hooks/hooks.json','utf8')); console.log('✓ hooks.json valid')" && echo 'All validations passed ✓'
scripts.postinstall: echo '' && echo '🚀 agent-skills installed!' && echo '' && echo 'Claude Code plugin for Java/Spring WebFlux reactive microservices.' && echo 'Run: claude plugin install ./node_modules/agent-skills' && echo ''
